requirement_topic.en: EAEU EMC Conformity for Grid-Connected Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 并网逆变器的EAEU电磁兼容符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 併網逆變器的EAEU電磁相容符合性

summary.en: PV inverters with electronic power-conversion circuits and grid interfaces commonly require EAEU EMC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011 when supplied in Kazakhstan. The technical file should address emissions, immunity, installation conditions, cabling, filters, and operating modes relevant to grid-connected inverter use.
summary.zh: 带有电子功率变换电路和电网接口的光伏逆变器在哈萨克斯坦供应时，通常需要按TR CU 020/2011进行EAEU电磁兼容符合性评价。技术文件应覆盖与并网逆变器使用相关的发射、抗扰度、安装条件、布线、滤波器和运行模式。
summary.zht: 帶有電子功率變換電路和電網介面的光伏逆變器在哈薩克斯坦供應時，通常需要按TR CU 020/2011進行EAEU電磁相容符合性評價。技術文件應覆蓋與併網逆變器使用相關的發射、抗擾度、安裝條件、佈線、濾波器和運行模式。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU EAC marking and technical-file requirements for EMC-regulated products

summary.en: China-side packages often include GB/T 37408-2019, GB/T 19964-2024, and EMC test evidence generated for IEC/CISPR or other export markets. Those reports may help build the EAEU technical file but must be checked against TR CU 020/2011 and the specific standards named by the Kazakhstan/EAEU conformity body.
summary.zh: 中国侧资料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2019、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向IEC/CISPR或其他出口市场形成的EMC测试证据。这些报告可帮助建立EAEU技术文件，但须按TR CU 020/2011及哈萨克斯坦/EAEU符合性机构指定的具体标准进行核对。
summary.zht: 中國側資料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2019、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向IEC/CISPR或其他出口市場形成的EMC測試證據。這些報告可幫助建立EAEU技術文件，但須按TR CU 020/2011及哈薩克斯坦/EAEU符合性機構指定的具體標準進行核對。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 11 / IEC 61000 series test evidence where available

gap.en: The practical gap is not only test limits. The EAEU file must match the exact model, firmware, filters, manuals, grid parameters, and intended installation. Reports prepared for China or another export market may need delta review or retesting.
gap.zh: 实际差距不只是测试限值。EAEU文件必须匹配具体型号、固件、滤波器、说明书、电网参数和预期安装方式。为中国或其他出口市场准备的报告可能需要差异审查或重新测试。
gap.zht: 實際差距不只是測試限值。EAEU文件必須匹配具體型號、韌體、濾波器、說明書、電網參數和預期安裝方式。為中國或其他出口市場準備的報告可能需要差異審查或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific only to the extent required by Chinese grid, EMC, or purchaser specifications; not equivalent to EAEU EMC conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC reports from China or other markets should be treated as input evidence, not as automatic TR CU 020/2011 compliance for Kazakhstan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自中国或其他市场的EMC报告应作为输入证据，而不是哈萨克斯坦TR CU 020/2011自动合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自中國或其他市場的EMC報告應作為輸入證據，而不是哈薩克斯坦TR CU 020/2011自動合規證明。
